_comment: ADLC MuleSoft pipeline allowlist — copied into each project's .claude/settings.json by /init. defaultMode is bypassPermissions because /sprint and /proceed run unattended pipelines that fire many routine commands; the allow list below is the safety contract. To require human prompts in your projects, set your user-level ~/.claude/settings.json defaultMode to 'acceptEdits' or 'plan' (project settings override user settings, so set it project-side here too if you want it everywhere). Pre-approves routine git/gh/anypoint-cli-v4/mvn/npm/npx invocations + Mule preflight + lint-skills + MUnit. Production deploys (mvn deploy -P*-prod, anypoint-cli-v4 ... --environment Production, anypoint-cli-v4 governance:apply) currently live in allow for unattended pipeline runs — move them to ask if you want a human gate. git/gh/npm use broad prefix wildcards (anything destructive there is already on the allow list explicitly); anypoint-cli-v4 and mvn stay granular so the safe/destructive split is auditable.
_mcp_comment: Two MuleSoft MCP servers wired here. DX MCP (mulesoft-mcp-server) uses stdio transport with client-credentials auth — needs ANYPOINT_CLIENT_ID/ANYPOINT_CLIENT_SECRET/ANYPOINT_REGION env vars set in the user's shell or in a .env file the launcher loads. Platform MCP uses mcp-remote@latest as a stdio bridge to the remote OAuth endpoint — needs ANYPOINT_PLATFORM_CLIENT_ID/ANYPOINT_PLATFORM_CLIENT_SECRET. Choose the regional Platform MCP URL (omni.mulesoft.com for US default; eu1/ca1/jp1/in1 prefixes for other regions). /init prompts for the connected-app credentials and writes them to a project-local .env (gitignored) — never commit the secrets to settings.json.
_hooks_comment: Stop / UserPromptSubmit hooks emit one JSONL event per turn boundary to ~/.adlc/runtime/user-wait.jsonl. The sprint dashboard tails this log to compute per-session/per-project/per-REQ user-wait time (the gap between Claude finishing a turn and you submitting the next prompt). No third-party deps; uses POSIX date and a single appendFile per event. Works inside git worktrees (CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR is set per-session by Claude Code).
